w:r.w:t: -16-1, Tower B, Vertical Business Suite, Avenue 3, Bangsar South, 59200 Kuala
Consider the employee's skill level, knowledge and understanding of all phases of the job and those requiring improved skills and/or experience.
Measures effectiveness in planning, organizing, and efficiently handling tasks and activities assigned on time, while eliminating unnecessary activities.
Effective in listening, expressing ideas, and
relevant and timely information to management, coworkers, subordinates and customers.
Measures effectiveness in understanding problems and making suggestions for rectifying the issue, and
Measures how well this individual gets along with fellow employees and able to work cooperatively to
Measures effectiveness in time management; initiative and independent action within prescribed limits.
under unusual circumstances; consider record of attendance and punctuality.
Consider the initiatives taken by the employee in pursuing upskilling opportunities within own limits (i.e., online resources, courses).
* Goal descriptions filled jointly by employee and reviewer; scored by reviewer only.
